name: 🏥 Patient Health Analytics — Full Dashboard & Email Report

nodes.name: ⏰ Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP:
────────────────────────────
• Default: Mon–Fri at 8:00 AM
• To change: edit cronExpression
  Every day 9AM  → 0 9 * * *
  Every Monday   → 0 8 * * 1
  Twice daily    → 0 8,17 * * *
• Set timezone in Workflow Settings (⚙️)
  e.g. Asia/Kolkata, America/New_York
• Click ▶ Execute Workflow to test now

nodes.name: 📋 Read Google Sheet
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP:
────────────────────────────
1. CREDENTIAL:
   • Settings → Credentials → + New
   • Choose: Google Sheets OAuth2 API
   • Click Sign in with Google → Allow
   • Save as 'Google Sheets OAuth2'

2. SHEET ID:
   • Open Google Sheet in browser
   • Copy from URL:
     .../spreadsheets/d/[COPY_THIS]/edit
   • Paste into Document ID field

3. TAB:
   • gid=0 = first tab (default)
   • Or switch mode to 'By Name'
     and type your sheet tab name

4. SHEET FORMAT:
   • Row 1 = Column Headers (required)
   • Any column names work!
   • No empty rows in data

nodes.name: 🔍 Analyze All Columns
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP: None required.
Auto-detects every column, computes full stats,
prepares 7 chart datasets, finds anomalies.

nodes.name: 📝 Build AI Prompt
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP: None required.
Dynamically builds analysis prompt from
whatever columns your sheet contains.

nodes.name: 🔄 Parse AI Response
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP: None required.
Full graceful fallback — report always
generates even if AI call fails.

nodes.name: 🎨 Build HTML Dashboard
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP: None required.
Generates full dark-theme HTML dashboard with:
• Doughnut chart
• Pie chart
• Horizontal bar chart
• 2× Histogram bars
• Grouped min/mean/max bar
• Radar completeness chart
• Polar area chart
• Line chart (if doctor column exists)
All using Chart.js CDN via jsdelivr.

parameters.subject: =🏥 Health Analytics Report — {{ $json.reportDate }} | Risk: {{ $json.riskLevel }} {{ $json.riskScore }}/10 | {{ $json.totalRecords }} Records | {{ $json.anomalyCount }} Alerts

nodes.name: 📧 Send Report via Gmail
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP:
────────────────────────────
1. CREDENTIAL:
   • Settings → Credentials → + New
   • Type: Gmail OAuth2 API
   • Sign in with Google → Authorize
   • Ensure Send Mail permission granted

2. RECIPIENT:
   • Replace 'RECIPIENT_EMAIL@example.com'
   • Multiple: a@b.com,c@d.com

3. SENDER NAME:
   • Change 'HealthAnalytics Pro'

4. SENDER EMAIL shown = your Gmail

⚠️ ONE sender active at a time:
   Using Gmail? Keep SMTP node disabled.
   Using SMTP? Disable this node.

nodes.name: ✅ Execution Log
nodes.notes:
USER SETUP: None required.
Logs final execution summary.
View in n8n → Executions tab.

Optional extension:
Connect a Slack / Teams node here
to get instant notifications.
